heading: Purposes
label: 190303 Purposes
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)19030336:5103., , .Oct. 23, 1992Pub. L. 102–484, title XVIII, § 1823106 Stat. 2584The word “objects” is omitted as included in “purposes”.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)19030336:5103., , .Oct. 23, 1992Pub. L. 102–484, title XVIII, § 1823106 Stat. 2584The word “objects” is omitted as included in “purposes”.

children.text: upholding and defending the Constitution of the United States;
promoting health, prosperity, and scholarship among its members and their dependents and survivors through benevolent programs;
assisting veterans and their dependents and survivors through a service program established for that purpose;
improving conditions for retired enlisted service members, veterans, and their dependents and survivors; and
fostering fraternal and social activities among its members in recognition that cooperative action is required for the furtherance of their common interests.
